title: Zunami Protocol - REKT
relevance_summary: Price manipulation using flash loans to manipulate LP token prices

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls totalHoldings() after a flash loan in the same tx

red_flags: Large token swaps using flash loans
Incorrect price calculation via totalHoldings function
monitoring_rules: BLOCK totalHoldings() calls within 10 minutes of a flash loan
summary: Zunami Protocol lost $2.1M due to a price manipulation attack using flash loans. A flawed price calculation function allowed attackers to manipulate LP token prices. A guard could have blocked transactions calling totalHoldings() shortly after a flash loan.
